'''Fe Sun''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and the second [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]. Soon after achieving knighthood, Sun was murdered by the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] criminal [[Lyshaa]].

==Biography==
===Jedi training and knighthood===
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Fe Sun was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] throughout her childhood, before being accepted as the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]. Unlike most Padawan-Master pairs, Ti and Sun did not accept journey missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]; instead Ti chose to train Sun in the wilds of [[Shili/Legends|Shili]]. Studying the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and how to survive in the wilderness, Ti's training methods emphasized training over experience.<ref name="JST" />

When it was deemed that Sun had completed her training, the girl faced her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] back on Coruscant and passed, ascending to the rank of Knight herself. Accepting missions from the High Council, her first assignment took her to a world plagued by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. Sent to quell a dispute, Sun faced a world inhabited by anti-Jedi natives, something she had never experienced on Shili. Unprepared, Sun was overwhelmed when the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] criminal [[Lyshaa]] led a revolt against her. Lyshaa, seeking fame for killing a Jedi, executed Jedi Sun and gloated about the deed.<ref name="JST" />

===Legacy===
The death of Fe Sun gave Shaak Ti the unpleasant distinction of having trained two Padawans who met a violent death after becoming a Knight. Though she was overcome by grief, Ti was able to continue, using her strength to stay strong and true to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Lyshaa, on the other hand, had little time to bask in her new found fame; for the Jedi were swift to exact justice on her. Lyshaa was sent to a prison complex on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] where she would stay until her death during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="JST" />
